contract_claim: L208-211: Comment says 'For constructors nested inside a class, also grep for ClassName(' but the code adds the ClassName( grep pattern for ALL methods whose function name appears in class_for_method — not only __init__/constructors. For non-constructor methods this adds a spurious constructor-call grep pattern, potentially introducing false call sites.
observed_behavior: Change comment to 'For methods inside a class, also grep for ClassName( to catch constructor calls and direct class invocations' or restrict the pattern addition to only __init__-style constructors if that was the original intent.
